methods.description: The process of collecting a fossil specimen from the Foulden Maar Fossil-Lagerstätte site in New Zealand.

steps.description: The single specimen described herein was collected at the Foulden Maar Fossil-Lagerstätte near Middlemarch, Otago, southern New Zealand.
steps.searchable_summary: collect fossil specimen from Foulden Maar site

methods.description: The process of studying and photographing the fossil specimen to reveal venational details and enhance contrast.

steps.description: The specimen was studied and photographed with a Nikon SMZ1000 stereomicroscope with attached Canon T3 camera.
steps.searchable_summary: photograph specimen using stereomicroscope and camera

steps.description: Wetting the specimen with ethanol revealed venational details of the wing and enhanced the contrast between the diatomite matrix and the fossil.
steps.searchable_summary: apply ethanol to specimen to reveal details

steps.description: Photographs were stacked and enhanced in Photoshop CS5.1 (Adobe Systems Inc.) and the drawing of the wing was prepared from photographs using CorelDraw.
steps.searchable_summary: stack and enhance photographs using Photoshop and CorelDraw
